SELECT businesses.business_id FROM businesses
JOIN inspections ON businesses.business_id = inspections.business_id
JOIN violations ON businesses.business_id = violations.business_id
WHERE violations.date = '2016-07-08' AND businesses.owner_name = 'Harman Gardin Inc.' AND businesses.owner_address = '200 Duboce' AND businesses.postal_code = '94103' AND businesses.longitude = -122.425 AND businesses.name = 'Kentucky Fried Chicken' AND inspections.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled' AND businesses.latitude = 37.7698
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which businesses entities with owner name equal to 'Harman Gardin Inc.' and owner address equal to '200 Duboce' and postal code equal to '94103' and longitude equal to '-122.425' and name equal to 'Kentucky Fried Chicken' and latitude equal to '37.7698', having at least one related inspections record (linked on businesses.business_id = inspections.business_id) with type equal to 'Routine - Unscheduled', having at least one related violations record (linked on businesses.business_id = violations.business_id) with date equal to '2016-07-08'?

qa_pairs.question: Which businesses owned by La Baguette, LLC in Palo Alto with zip code 94304 had low-risk violations for unclean or degraded floors, walls, or ceilings during routine unscheduled inspections on or before 2014-05-30?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT businesses.business_id FROM businesses
JOIN inspections ON businesses.business_id = inspections.business_id
JOIN violations ON businesses.business_id = violations.business_id
WHERE inspections.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled' AND businesses.owner_name = 'La Baguette, LLC' AND businesses.owner_zip = '94304' AND violations.risk_category = 'Low Risk' AND violations.description = 'Unclean or degraded floors walls or ceilings' AND inspections.date <= '2014-05-30' AND businesses.owner_city = 'Palo Alto'

involved_filters.value: Unclean or degraded floors walls or ceilings

involved_values.violations.description: Unclean or degraded floors walls or ceilings

qa_pairs.question: Which businesses owned by Biergarten, LLC / Fabricio Wiest, Aaron Hulme, Matthew Johansen, Matt Hulme at 424 Octavia St in CA with tax code H24 had a Moderate Risk violation on 2013-11-14 and a Routine - Unscheduled inspection?

qa_pairs.question: Which businesses named exactly 'Big Slice Pizza', owned in the state of CA, have recorded inspections on or before 2015-04-24 and also have recorded violations?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT businesses.business_id FROM businesses
JOIN inspections ON businesses.business_id = inspections.business_id
JOIN violations ON businesses.business_id = violations.business_id
WHERE inspections.date <= '2015-04-24' AND businesses.name = 'Big Slice Pizza' AND businesses.owner_state = 'CA'
